summary: All 4 AI Transaction Orchestrator phases tested and working. Backend: 24/24 tests PASS. Frontend: All 4 pages load correctly with proper UI elements and data-testid attributes.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings on select element with span wrapper - does not affect functionality (same as iteration_33)

Good: All pages have data-testid attributes for testing
Good: AI Conductor provides contextual guidance with greeting, next_steps, blockers, timeline_estimate
Good: Evidence Package generates comprehensive forensic bundles with integrity hashes
Good: Document Remediation correctly analyzes docs and returns risk_score, missing_clauses
Good: Biometric Passport correctly validates session requirements (facial + one other modality)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 phases of AI Transaction Orchestrator fully tested: Phase 1 (Doc Remediation at /document-remediation, APIs at /api/remediation/*), Phase 2 (Biometric Passport at /biometric-passport, APIs at /api/biometric-passport/*), Phase 3 (AI Conductor at /conductor/:transactionId, APIs at /api/conductor/*), Phase 4 (Evidence Package at /evidence-package/:transactionId, APIs at /api/evidence-package/*). Dashboard shows Doc Remediation and Biometric Passport quick action buttons. Transaction Room shows AI Conductor and Evidence buttons in header.

phase_4_evidence_package.POST /api/evidence-package/generate/{id}: Generates package with integrity_hash, components - PASS
